creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
> Synopsis: Take maintainership, removed messages warning in the
> Makefile, used USE_LDCONFIG

This does not require USE_LDCONFIG, as it does not istall any libraries
that may be used by other ports.

Also, next time please specify port name in the synopsis.

--
